chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1231 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Non-Prosecution 17-04-2024 Petitioner present in person. ***** This petition is filed seeking directions to the respondents for conducting repair work of the roads in Taluka Moro-Naushahro Feroze. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G, present in Court, waives notice of this petition and submits that subject to availability of funds and after necessary approval from the competent authority, necessary repair work would be conducted. Petitioner is satisfied and accordingly this petition is disposed of. Office to communicate copy of this order to the office of AAG. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
